decisions.title: Prioritize Sift Edge GUI vs Canvas investment for Q2
decisions.context: Edge GUI table view (ENG-9883) and Canvas status updates (ENG-9895) both require engineering resources. Edge represents 'Build the Moat' while Canvas is 'Nail the Core'. Need to sequence investment to maximize Decisions Captured Per Customer.

arguments.for: Edge GUI directly enables edge deployment decisions for customers, creating competitive moat. Canvas improvements increase decision velocity for existing users.
arguments.against: Canvas has broader user base today. Delaying Canvas risks churn on core product while Edge builds slowly.

decisions.title: Block SCIM email invitations permanently or temporary fix?
decisions.context: ENG-9785 blocks email invites for SCIM orgs. This impacts customer onboarding flow. Related: ENG-9783 (SCIM testing), ENG-5178 (AWS Identity Center), ENG-9613 (IdP onboarding tool). Decision affects 'Embed Deeper' pillar.
decisions.blockedBy: Need to reproduce SCIM errors (ENG-9783) before committing to permanent block vs graceful degradation

arguments.for: Permanent block prevents security gaps and forces proper SCIM adoption, strengthening enterprise position.
arguments.against: Temporary friction may delay customer rollouts. Need SCIM testing infrastructure first to ensure we don't break existing customers.

decisions.title: GovCloud Windmill deployment: Build vs Partner integration
decisions.context: ENG-9939 deploys Windmill for DS customer workflow management in GovCloud. This is 'Embed Deeper' territory but requires compliance overhead. Affects government customer segment strategy.

arguments.for: Building in-house gives full control over compliance posture and accelerates GovCloud customer acquisition. Demonstrates commitment to regulated industries.
arguments.against: High maintenance burden for specialized deployment. Partner integration or SaaS offering might let us focus on core Sift value. Diverts from 'Nail the Core'.

decisions.title: Explore V2 GA readiness: Block on E1 sharelink parity?
decisions.context: ENG-9717 shows E1 sharelinks with Compare don't work in E2 relative mode. Explore V2 is critical 'Nail the Core' product. Do we block GA on full E1 parity or accept known gaps?

arguments.for: Sharelinks are collaboration primitive. Blocking GA ensures no regression in decision-sharing workflows. Maintains trust.
arguments.against: Perfect parity delays value delivery. Most users won't hit this edge case. Ship GA with known issues doc, fix in V2.1.

decisions.title: Standardize internal telemetry before scaling Ask SIFT
decisions.context: ENG-8533 adds alerts for sift_app telemetry. Ask SIFT will generate massive internal signal volume. Need robust observability before scaling AI features. Affects 'Build the Moat' (AI differentiation).

arguments.for: Telemetry foundation prevents future debugging nightmares. AI features create unpredictable load—need visibility before scaling.
arguments.against: Delays Ask SIFT rollout. Telemetry can iterate post-launch if we're disciplined about instrumentation.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High decision load week: SCIM blocking issue requires rapid resolution, Explore V2 GA readiness review Friday, Edge roadmap planning session. 31 Linear tickets active across core product areas.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today—insufficient for deep decision work on GovCloud and SCIM strategy
Three 1:1s clustered in afternoon may fragment context for Explore V2 decision (due Apr 7)
Meeting hours at 80% of available time—consider async decision docs for non-critical topics
